description: Render lightweight animated GIF QA previews from extracted Codex pet frames, one looping GIF per state using the per-state frame durations.
rules: local-only — reads frame dirs, writes one <state>.gif per row plus a JSON manifest
requires all 9 rows present with their exact frame counts; otherwise the core errors and the porter records a placeholder manifest
previews written to record_store/previews; manifest written to record_store/previews-manifest.json
usage: Set FRAMES_ROOT (the dir of per-state frame folders). Output: previews-manifest.json and previews/<state>.gif.
limitation: QA visualization only; does not validate frame quality (use inspect-frames). Requires Pillow (PIL); without it or with incomplete rows the porter writes a placeholder manifest.
